description: Infernal explorer who turns dimensional curios into precise, opportunistic pressure.

presentation.headline: Dimensional explorer who finds opportunity in every fractured battlefield.
presentation.fantasy_hook: A relic backpack, oversized monocle, travel scarf, and rift compass make the seeker a clear infernal adventurer.
presentation.identity_summary: The Relic Seeker mixes portal tools with precision relics from several arsenals. Takedowns reveal temporary opportunities, increasing luck and attack range.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant luck and attack range, stacking up to three times as the seeker uncovers better angles and rarer openings.
tradeoffs: Lower immediate power than focused hunters
Needs takedowns to reveal the best finds
